name: Patty Ann's Mocha Nut Butter Balls
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Walnuts or Pecans; finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Patty Ann Spalding Preparation Time: 0:30
Oven at 325°F. Cream butter, sugar, and vanilla until light. Add next four ingredients. Mix well. Add nuts. Shape into 1-inch balls on ungreased cookie sheets. Bake at 325°F for about 17-20 minutes. Roll in powdered sugar while warm.
